invariant: BF3 — new IDs must continue strictly above the baseline high-water; no reuse of a baseline index
seed: run SYNTHESIZE/VERIFY (P2+P3 verify-only) against baseline-map id_high_water
load_bearing_assertion: Verifier detects new R10/AC10 collide with baseline R10/AC10 (high_water R:10, AC:10). Verdict 'rejected'/'aprd_defect'. Golden uses R11/R13 + AC11/AC13 — all strictly above high-water, zero collisions.

expected_signal.basis: baseline-map.id_high_water { R:10, AC:10 } — new R10/AC10 reuse a baseline index

separates_from_golden_by: id_threading.collisions (empty in golden / [R10,AC10] here) — the BF3 invariant, not cosmetics.
